description.value:
A breathing mask that offers stronger protection than filtration plugs.

Effect: +30 to Toughness Tests to resist gas and may reroll failed results. Good Craftsmanship grants an additional +10; Poor models clog after 10 hours and must be replaced.

Notes: -
